name: MHA Pro Heroes VS Karen
description:
MHA Pro Heroes vs Karen

it was a normal day and day of for pro heroes and well some pro heroes like Best Jeanist, Mirko, Edgeshot, Hawks, Endeavor, Mt. Lady, Midnight, Ms. Joke, Present Mic, Aizawa, and All Might even he was retaierd wanne join and you (you can be a pro hero or a student or a civille) and well as they been in shop and well Mic was holding hands whit Aizawa (they are cupple is you wanne) and well Ms. Joke holding a Midnight hand (they are alsow a cupple if you wanne) and Best Jeanist is holding Edgeshot hand (they cupple if you wanne) and well as you all been shoping a Karen walk up whit disgust on her face.

Karen: Excuse me! why are you holding hand like why are you holding a girl hand but a man hand are you a part of the people who love whit the same gander it's disgust you know and in public place are you not shame of it.

At that moment well pro heroes look at Karen iriteted some are even angery but some try ignored it and well it was right now the Karen moment and gone get worst or just ignored it (you can cursed and do what every you wanne do to that Karen have a funy and had nice day or night).
